description: Case style: Analogue chronograph watch with a stainless steel round case and a fixed bezel Dial style: White dial with white hands Strap style: Steel strap with a butterfly clasp Features: Three chronograph time displays Branding and date aperture on the 3 hour mark on the dial Screw to reset time Water resistance up to 3 ATM, will withstand accidental splashes but not suitable for swimming Warranty: 1 year
